overview: The strongest supportive currents come through Guru and Shani. Pressure points are tied to Rahu and Ketu and need measured handling.
yearlyTheme: Throughout the Sri Parabhava year, Makara Rasi (Capricorn) natives will experience highly favorable results due to the influence of Saturn, including financial support from siblings and improved longevity and well-being for those with a strong Saturn in their personal birth charts, even if Jupiter poses health challenges. While a spiritual inclination and newfound technical knowledge will lead to prosperity and abundant yields for farmers, the youth may struggle with decreased agility and a tendency to procrastinate, potentially losing out on significant opportunities due to delays in completing tasks. Furthermore, an increase in greed could lead some to act ungratefully even toward their benefactors; however, since Makara Rasi is completely free from the effects of Sade Sati (Elinati Shani) this year, the overall impact of Saturn remains positive and supportive.
opportunities: Throughout the Sri Parabhava year, Makara Rasi (Capricorn) natives will experience highly favorable results due to the influence of Saturn, including financial support from siblings and improved longevity and well-being for those with a strong Saturn in their personal birth charts, even if Jupiter poses health challenges. Throughout the Sri Parabhava year, Makara Rasi (Capricorn) natives will face unfavorable results due to the influence of Rahu, leading to frequent financial difficulties and a noticeable decline in willpower when executing planned tasks.
caution: Throughout the Sri Parabhava year, Makara Rasi (Capricorn) natives will also face unfavorable results due to the influence of Ketu, leading to persistent physical ailments and unnecessary financial expenditures. There are strong indications of achieving high-ranking positions and receiving new rewards or honors; however, be cautious during the final week, as there is a possibility of health issues or the need for a surgical procedure.
studiesCareer: Gains from speculation or stock market transactions may not meet expectations; however, engineering students will find encouraging opportunities in job placements. Those in government sectors should be wary, as involvement in unethical gains could lead to situations causing loss of mental peace.
familyRelationships: Specifically, those who have Kala Sarpa Dosha in their personal birth charts may experience significant challenges in their marital life due to the combined negative impact of Rahu and Ketu; therefore, it is highly recommended for Makara Rasi individuals to recite the Ketu Mantra daily throughout the year to mitigate these hardships. You may notice unexpected changes in the behavior of family members, but despite such hurdles, you will achieve your goals through self-reliance and skillful execution.
healthWellbeing: Throughout the Sri Parabhava year, Makara Rasi (Capricorn) natives will experience highly favorable results due to the influence of Saturn, including financial support from siblings and improved longevity and well-being for those with a strong Saturn in their personal birth charts, even if Jupiter poses health challenges. There are strong indications of achieving high-ranking positions and receiving new rewards or honors; however, be cautious during the final week, as there is a possibility of health issues or the need for a surgical procedure.
blessing: Overall, for Makara Rasi (Capricorn) natives during the Sri Parabhava year, favorable results will be primarily derived from the influence of Saturn alone, while Jupiter, Rahu, and Ketu are expected to cause significant hardships and challenges. To navigate these difficulties and find relief, it is highly recommended to frequently perform the Shanti Japam (propitiatory prayers) for Jupiter (Guru), Rahu, and Ketu throughout the year.

planetaryInfluences.summary: Throughout the Sri Parabhava year, Makara Rasi (Capricorn) natives will experience highly favorable results due to the influence of Saturn, including financial support from siblings and improved longevity and well-being for those with a strong Saturn in their personal birth charts, even if Jupiter poses health challenges. While a spiritual inclination and newfound technical knowledge will lead to prosperity and abundant yields for farmers, the youth may struggle with decreased agility and a tendency to procrastinate, potentially losing out on significant opportunities due to delays in completing tasks. Furthermore, an increase in greed could lead some to act ungratefully even toward their benefactors; however, since Makara Rasi is completely free from the effects of Sade Sati (Elinati Shani) this year, the overall impact of Saturn remains positive and supportive.

Throughout the Sri Parabhava year, Makara Rasi (Capricorn) natives will experience highly favorable results due to the influence of Saturn, including financial support from siblings and improved longevity and well-being for those with a strong Saturn in their personal birth charts, even if Jupiter poses health challenges. While a spiritual inclination and newfound technical knowledge will lead to prosperity and abundant yields for farmers, the youth may struggle with decreased agility and a tendency to procrastinate, potentially losing out on significant opportunities due to delays in completing tasks. Furthermore, an increase in greed could lead some to act ungratefully even toward their benefactors; however, since Makara Rasi is completely free from the effects of Sade Sati (Elinati Shani) this year, the overall impact of Saturn remains positive and supportive.

Throughout the Sri Parabhava year, Makara Rasi (Capricorn) natives will face unfavorable results due to the influence of Rahu, leading to frequent financial difficulties and a noticeable decline in willpower when executing planned tasks. Efforts regarding progeny may face setbacks, and existing children might encounter severe health complications; furthermore, a shift toward a negative or harmful mindset may arise without provocation, causing you to distance yourself from well-wishers and supportive friends through your own actions. To mitigate these adverse effects, it is highly recommended for Makara Rasi individuals to recite the Rahu Mantra

Throughout the Sri Parabhava year, Makara Rasi (Capricorn) natives will also face unfavorable results due to the influence of Ketu, leading to persistent physical ailments and unnecessary financial expenditures. Specifically, those who have Kala Sarpa Dosha in their personal birth charts may experience significant challenges in their marital life due to the combined negative impact of Rahu and Ketu; therefore, it is highly recommended for Makara Rasi individuals to recite the Ketu Mantra daily throughout the year to mitigate these hardships.

monthlyHighlights.summary: In this month, you will encounter situations where you must focus on fulfilling your duties without being affected by the criticism of others. While financial income remains average, this is an auspicious period to initiate efforts for constructing your own house and a favorable time for embarking on new experiments or innovative ventures. There are strong indications of achieving high-ranking positions and receiving new rewards or honors; however, be cautious during the final week, as there is a possibility of health issues or the need for a surgical procedure.

This month brings promising matrimonial prospects for the unmarried, while financial income is expected to remain average. Gains from speculation or stock market transactions may not meet expectations; however, engineering students will find encouraging opportunities in job placements. Caution is advised during daily travels, especially in the second week, as there is a risk of losing valuable items. You may notice unexpected changes in the behavior of family members, but despite such hurdles, you will achieve your goals through self-reliance and skillful execution. While appearing simple to others, you will demonstrate great competence in worldly affairs, cleverly fulfilling your objectives while seemingly helping others. Those in government sectors should be wary, as involvement in unethical gains could lead to situations causing loss of mental peace. Notably, travels undertaken on the 13th, 14th, and 15th of this month will prove to be fruitful.

During this month, the arrival of new individuals will bring joy to the household through the celebration of auspicious events, and long-standing issues related to ancestral property or inheritance will finally be resolved. It is advisable to communicate directly and candidly in the presence of family elders regarding any important matters. While students will benefit from excellent memory power and individuals born under the Dhanishta constellation will experience heightened willpower and success, business ventures will also show significant growth and progress. You will be in a position to purchase new household appliances; however, between the 20th and 26th of the month, expect some financial expenditure due to the health issues of family members. The dates of the 27th, 28th, 29th, and 30th are particularly favorable for Makara Rasi natives to make important decisions regarding their personal lives.

During this month, your planned tasks will be completed despite facing minor obstacles; however, you should remain undeterred by hurdles and refuse to accept defeat. While you may uncover the subtle secrets of someone within your circle of friends, your professional life will bring surprisingly favorable events, and a tranquil atmosphere will allow you to enjoy a pleasant family environment. Although business and income remain average, business owners may inadvertently damage their reputation by displaying an unyielding or dismissive attitude toward well-wishers once their financial obligations are settled. Between the 10th and 16th, extra caution is required regarding the health of newborn infants, while elders may experience increased headaches. Please note that the 3rd, 5th, 10th, 12th, and 19th are not favorable dates for significant activities.

This month, employees will see a reduction in career-related problems, while your personal prestige grows within both society and the family. International travels will prove beneficial, and business ventures will yield expected profits and financial growth; however, those born under the Sravana constellation must learn to control their expenditures. While pending debts are likely to be recovered, matters regarding children may not be favorable this month. Be cautious, as new female acquaintances might cause you to lose sight of reality, leading to increased infatuation and a significant lack of focus. Specifically, women born under the Sravana star should be extremely vigilant regarding financial matters. Notably, the 14th, 15th, and 16th of this month are highly auspicious for achieving success in all career-related endeavors.

This month will bring average results, with a particular focus on health concerns such as digestive irregularities and skin-related issues. Individuals born under the Uttarashada constellation, as well as those in the fishing profession, should exercise extreme caution, especially regarding water-related travels or activities. During the second and third weeks, financial transactions may not yield the expected profits; however, by the month's end, you are likely to receive the favorable news you have been awaiting regarding family matters. Since your mental state may fluctuate frequently this month, it is highly recommended to seek your spouse's advice before making important decisions and to consciously avoid impulsive anger. To navigate these challenges, daily recitation of Sri Kanaka Durga Devi Ashtottara Shatanamavali is advised, as the Divine Mother’s grace will help you overcome these hurdles.

During this month, you will receive great respect, affection, and care from your female children, and your importance within the family will be recognized as you successfully manage various household responsibilities. While business professionals will secure their expected profits and general health concerns will begin to subside, you may encounter some unexpected expenditures related to hospitality or unplanned guests at home. Your influence will grow among neighbors thanks to your association with reputable and prominent friends, and your financial income will remain satisfactory throughout this period. However, farmers may face crop losses due to unstable weather conditions. In your personal life, you will express profound and unconditional love toward your spouse, and for the unemployed, the period between the 14th and 19th of this month is particularly favorable for new opportunities.

monthlyHighlights.summary: This month may not yield the expected results as expenditures are likely to spiral out of control despite low personal spending or material consumption. You may find yourself undertaking unproductive journeys regarding real estate matters, and business owners should be prepared for potential losses due to disruptions in the transport of raw materials. New ventures are unlikely to succeed during this period, and employees will face significant stress and heavy workloads due to pressure from superiors; even when tasks seem straightforward, officials may create unexpected complications that hinder your progress and prevent the timely completion of goals. Furthermore, you may experience frequent disturbing dreams, and this month is unfavorable for the health of your siblings, potentially requiring your direct involvement and support in the final week. For the unmarried, matrimonial efforts are likely to face obstacles and delays during this time.

This month will continue to provide mixed results, requiring you to seek the support of others to find the right path for completing your tasks. Even though you are careful not to spend a single penny without a guaranteed return, your overall expenditures will remain high during this period. While your planned activities will eventually reach completion despite several obstacles, haste in your professional life could lead to unnecessary problems; therefore, it is wise to be cautious and calculated when judging the character of others. Across all sectors, financial gains may not meet expectations this month, with the notable exception of those in construction-related businesses such as iron and cement, who will see significant growth and progress. Please remain extra vigilant in all matters on the 17th, 18th, 24th, and 25th of this month.

In this month, financial income will remain average, but expenditures related to personal and family health issues will begin to decrease. You will finally find relief from the thoughts and worries that have been troubling you for some time; however, it is advisable to avoid procrastination when making important decisions. While business activities may face sudden interruptions, infants born this month are predicted to develop clear speech within just a few months. During the second week, you may encounter situations where you feel compelled to speak untruths for personal gain, but irritations and problems will start to subside from the third Thursday of the month. Those seeking employment will receive good news, and your financial situation will improve toward the end of the month, though family matters may become public due to a lack of mutual understanding between family members.

The start of this English New Year will be highly profitable, with financial income meeting your expectations and business affairs progressing smoothly. This is an excellent period for the unmarried as promising matrimonial matches will be finalized, and your past strategic plans will finally see successful fruition. While those in the priesthood or Vedic professions will find this month particularly rewarding, you must remain cautious regarding your food habits to maintain health. Be wary of deceptive comments made by outsiders about your family members, as listening to such talk could lead to long-term mental unrest; it is best to stay away from unnecessary disputes during this time. While the second and third weeks will yield only average results, you will manage to complete your targets at the very last minute in the final week. Furthermore, those aspiring for children will be blessed with healthy progeny through divine grace.

During this month, you will experience significant financial encouragement as income from your primary profession is supplemented by earnings from other sources, and your financial standing will meet your expectations. Your social circle will expand to include influential and high-ranking individuals, and those in politics will see an increase in their prominence and importance. Students will be successful in securing scholarships, and those seeking opportunities abroad will find the period highly profitable; additionally, employees who have been under suspension are likely to be reinstated to their duties. This is also an auspicious month to initiate efforts toward constructing your own home, and your interest in spiritual discourses will deepen. Furthermore, there are strong indications for undertaking travels or pilgrimages with family members during the 25th, 26th, and 27th of the month.

This month serves as an excellent period for home construction projects and the strategic expansion of your business ventures. You will experience a steady growth in financial income as long-awaited payments finally reach your hands, and your professional dedication will be recognized through prestigious honors and awards. A sense of complete favorability prevails across all aspects of your life during this time, with family conditions remaining deeply satisfying and harmonious. Notably, the period between the 19th and the 27th of this month stands out as exceptionally auspicious and beneficial for all your endeavors.

notes: OCR used page 1 of the local PDF capture.
Match status is based on heading, available metrics, available annual section markers, and first month marker.
